operations.purpose: Fetch all assignments between drivers and vehicles.
operations.usage: Used to identify which driver is assigned to which vehicle.

query_parameters.name: filterBy
query_parameters.description: Filter assignments by drivers or vehicles.

query_parameters.name: driverIds
query_parameters.description: Filter assignments for specific driver IDs.

query_parameters.name: vehicleIds
query_parameters.description: Filter assignments for specific vehicle IDs.

query_parameters.name: after
query_parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching next page.

operations.description: Assign a driver to a vehicle.
operations.purpose: Create a relationship between a driver and a vehicle.
operations.usage: Used when assigning drivers to vehicles for operations or trips.

operations.description: Remove a driver from a vehicle.
operations.purpose: Remove an existing assignment between a driver and vehicle.
operations.usage: Used when a driver is no longer assigned to a specific vehicle.

operations.purpose: Modify an existing driver and vehicle assignment.
operations.usage: Used when reassignment or correction of driver-vehicle mapping is needed.
